chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1330 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.5172/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 06-10-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>>..<<<<<< Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Channa, Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of legal-heirs of petitioner as well as statement, which are taken on record, therefore, he does not press instant Constitutional Petition and further submits that if the legal-heirs of the Petitioner, if received any notice they will challenge the same independently. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
